title: Amazon pays me royalties every month forever #amazonkdp
spoken_script:
# Amazon KDP Passive Income - 45 Second Script

**[HOOK - 0-5 seconds]**
Want to make money while you sleep? Amazon KDP lets you publish books with literally zero dollars upfront.

**[BODY - 5-35 seconds]**
Here's the play. You create low content books. We're talking journals, planners, puzzle books. Use free AI tools to design them once. Upload to KDP. That's it. Amazon handles the printing, the shipping, everything. Money just lands in your account.

One puzzle book? I'm talking 20 to 200 dollars a month. I've got ten of these running right now on complete autopilot. Just sitting there making money.

**[CTA - 35-45 seconds]**
I put together a full free guide showing exactly how to do this. Link is in my bio. Completely free to start. Go check it out.
